name: browser_type
description: Type text into an input, textarea, or contenteditable element by ref.

clear.description: When true, clear existing text first.

submit.description: When true, press Enter after typing.

slowly.description: When true, type character by character.

viewId.description: Target browser tab ID. If omitted, uses the last interacted tab.

take_screenshot_afterwards.description: When true, takes a screenshot after typing completes. Defaults to false.
